prompt: Extremely ultra-realistic wide-angle environmental photograph — indistinguishable from a real photograph by a National Geographic documentary photographer. A full-body wide shot capturing the complete sacred blessing ceremony in its entirety within a lush tropical garden sanctuary. The scene shows the FULL BODIES of both women from head to toe within the natural sacred space. Gislaine, the shaman healer, is the same exact woman from the reference images — reproduce her face with photographic accuracy. She stands tall and majestic behind and slightly to the side of the person she is blessing. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho with vivid rainbow V-shaped horizontal stripes — pink, hot pink, emerald green, blue, sky blue, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white — with multicolored crocheted tassels along the entire bottom edge fully visible, the poncho draping down past her hips showing its full magnificent size and all the handmade crocheted texture. Same white wrapped turban with the golden braided band and turquoise-green oval gemstone. Same cowrie shell bracelet. She is barefoot on the green grass, her feet grounded directly on Mother Earth. THE BLESSING: Gislaine holds a thick abundant bundle of fresh green sacred herbs — arruda, rosemary, guiné, basil — in her right hand, gently pressing and brushing the leaves against the top of the seated person's head. Her left hand rests lovingly on the person's crown, channeling energy. GISLAINE'S EXPRESSION: A warm, loving, peaceful half-smile. Eyes softly half-closed in spiritual connection. She radiates pure maternal love, sacred joy, and spiritual fulfillment — a woman giving the most precious gift of healing energy with absolute love. No sadness, no strain — only love and divine grace. THE PERSON RECEIVING: A woman sitting on a simple low wooden stool in front of Gislaine. She wears a simple flowing white cotton dress. She is also barefoot on the grass — connected to the earth. Her head is gently bowed, eyes closed, a subtle serene peaceful smile. Her hands rest open on her lap, palms upward in total receptivity. She is deeply centered and surrendered to the healing. THE SACRED SPACE — WIDE VIEW: The camera is pulled back far enough to show the entire scene as an environmental portrait. The lush tropical garden surrounds both women like a living cathedral — tall palm trees with graceful fronds arching overhead creating a natural canopy, dense tropical plants and ferns on the sides, green grass beneath their bare feet. On the ground near them, a small rustic arrangement: a burning bundle of white sage on a clay dish sending a beautiful thin spiral of white smoke upward through the golden light. The wide view reveals the magnificent scale of nature embracing these two women — they are held within Mother Earth's arms. ENERGY AND LIGHT: Spectacular dramatic god rays — multiple thick beams of warm golden sunlight — pierce through the palm canopy from above and behind, creating breathtaking shafts of divine light that illuminate both figures and the smoke. The golden light rays are visible from the top of the frame all the way down to the ground, showing their full majestic length. Hundreds of golden luminous particles float in the air throughout the scene, caught in the light beams like sacred cosmic dust. From where the herbs and Gislaine's hand touch the person's head, a subtle warm golden-green luminous glow radiates — the healing energy transfer visible as gentle light. The white sage smoke curls upward through the god rays creating an ethereal, mystical layered atmosphere. The colorful poncho catches the golden backlight making every color stripe glow vibrantly. The white clothing of the seated woman glows ethereally. The overall atmosphere is of witnessing something ancient, sacred, and profoundly beautiful — a healing ritual in nature's temple. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 35mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 200. Camera at eye level, positioned approximately 3-4 meters away, capturing the full environmental scene. Medium depth of field — both figures sharp, foreground grass slightly soft, background trees dissolving into warm golden-green bokeh. Natural warm golden color grading. This is the definitive image of the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — the complete sacred healing ceremony captured in all its grandeur, love, and divine beauty.
